rationale: The citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior disfluency findings from product/goal contexts to service agents and mechanism-level inferences, which closely matches the cited paper’s core result that metacognitive difficulty can increase evaluations in special-occasion product domains via lay-theory interpretation. This looks like a likely theoretical foundation/comparison point rather than a generic mention, and the DOI-level match (10.1509/jmkr.47.6.1059) confirms the specific target reference.
